Header.title: Hansal Patel
Header.paragraph: Aspiring Cybersecurity Professional & Computer Engineering Student. Specialized in penetration testing, security tooling, and AI-driven security solutions.

About.paragraph: I am a Computer Engineering student at A.D. Patel Institute of Technology (CPI: 9.03) with a passion for cybersecurity. My experience ranges from building custom security toolkits for Kali Linux to developing AI-enabled interview platforms and travel planners. I focus on vulnerability assessment, network analysis, and secure application development.

Project1.title: Cybersecurity Toolkit for Kali Linux
Project1.description: Built a comprehensive CLI-based penetration testing toolkit covering recon, attack simulation, and data protection. It integrates a Network Scanner, Phishing Tool, URL Inspector, Secure File Sharing, and Wordlist Generator (CUPP). Designed with a modular, menu-driven architecture for streamlined execution on Kali Linux.

features.title: CLI Powered
features.text: Full interactive command-line interface for efficient security workflows.

features.title: Recon & Scanning
features.text: Integrated network scanning and URL inspection for vulnerability discovery.

features.title: Data Protection
features.text: Built-in tools for secure file sharing and phishing analysis.

features.title: Modular Design
features.text: Easily expandable architecture allowing for the addition of new security modules.

Project2.title: AI-Enabled Interview Platform
Project2.description: Engineered a sophisticated platform for interview preparation and personality analysis using Next.js and the Gemini AI API. Features secure multi-user session management via Firebase and AI-driven API integration for controlled, secure data handling and real-time analysis.

features.name: AI Analysis
features.text: Real-time personality and performance feedback powered by Gemini AI.

features.name: Secure Auth
features.text: Enterprise-grade multi-user authentication and session management.

features.name: Data Privacy
features.text: Strict controls over data flow ensuring user information remains protected.

Project3.title: AI Travel Planner (VagaWise)
Project3.description: Developed a full-stack AI travel planner that crafts personalized itineraries and budget allocations. Implemented Firebase-backed authentication and secure API communication, integrating third-party APIs with robust input validation to prevent unauthorized access.
